text: Hello. Hello. Hello. Good afternoon. This is Alyssa. I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through a Mississippi State Relief Program. So far, have you received any updates or notifications about this yet? No. No. Oh, that's all right. That's exactly why I'm calling. I want to help you get these benefits processed before they go unclaimed. You're covered under both Part A and Part B, yes? No, I'm not. Sorry, but you don't seem to qualify for the plans that we have. Have a great day.
